headline: Agent-native development tooling and on-device multi-agent systems dominated the window as Cursor and Google pushed local execution forward.
body: Cursor's inaugural Compile conference produced Cursor Mobile, the Origin Git platform, cloud agent updates, and a model trained from scratch, with the company reporting that 95% of usage is now agents [6]. Google demonstrated Gemma 4 running 10 independent subagents on a single local machine above 170 tokens per second using orchestrator-and-subagent delegation [4], reinforcing the breakout in local models and local inference. The AI operating system theme surfaced across Hermes updates, which introduced a Blank Slate mode for building lean agents and an Agent Operating System with async sub-agents and loop engineering [1][7]. SEO automation also clustered heavily, with multiple agentic systems tying Claude Code to Search Console data and Agent OS [5][8].
